title: Define Wave 24 manager dashboard summary and priorities contract
description: Extend architecture docs with manager dashboard summary payload contract, deterministic priorities feed schema, and UI state transitions for loading, empty, degraded, and refresh flows.
acceptance_criteria: Contract defines /properties/summary payload including KPI block and priorities list shape
Contract defines deterministic priorities taxonomy and timestamp semantics
UI state map defines dashboard load, refresh, empty priorities, and fallback error transitions
